meaning: 亡羊补牢的意思是丢了羊之后修补羊圈。比喻出了问题以后想办法补救，可以防止继续受损失。
characterDescription: A cute, fluffy white lamb named Little Wooly with soft curly fur, big expressive black eyes, and tiny pink inner ears. He wears a small red knitted scarf around his neck. The art style is warm, cozy 3D Pixar-style animation render, featuring soft pastel colors, gentle lighting, and rounded shapes suitable for children aged 3-8.
styleDescription: Warm, cozy 3D Pixar-style animation render, featuring soft pastel colors, gentle lighting, and rounded shapes suitable for children aged 3-8.

scenes.title: 坚固的羊圈
scenes.description: Little Wooly is sleeping peacefully inside a sturdy wooden sheep pen on a sunny afternoon. The pen has high walls and a secure latch.

scenes.narration: 从前有个小羊羊，住在木棚很安详。墙壁高来门锁好，每天睡觉香又香。
scenes.compositionHint: Wide angle shot showing the whole sheep pen and the peaceful environment.

scenes.narration: 有一天，大灰狼，悄悄咬破木栅栏。小羊不知危险近，还在旁边玩得很欢。
scenes.compositionHint: Medium shot focusing on the broken fence while the lamb is in the background.

scenes.narration: 夜深了，月光照，黑影悄悄进来了。小羊惊醒吓一跳，心里害怕不得了。

scenes.title: 丢失的小羊
scenes.description: Morning. Little Wooly is gone. Another sheep in the pen looks worried. The hole in the fence is clearly visible.

scenes.narration: 天亮啦，太阳升，发现少了一只羊。邻居大叔摇摇头，叹气声声好悲伤。
scenes.compositionHint: Over-the-shoulder shot from the remaining sheep looking at the empty space where Little Wooly used to be.

scenes.narration: 羊圈修好真牢固，小羊平安又幸福。亡羊补牢为时未晚，知错能改最棒！
